prompt: A candid cinematic lifestyle photo of a young woman sitting alone at a tiny weathered metal café table on a narrow cobblestone street in a sunlit old European town. She has shoulder-length wavy medium brown hair, small gold hoop earrings, and wears a soft beige knit sweater with relaxed blue jeans. She sits with one leg crossed, holding a patterned ceramic coffee cup in one hand while an open paperback book rests on the table in front of her, with her other hand lightly touching the pages. A smartphone lies on the left side of the table. The background shows warm stone buildings with wooden shutters, potted green plants outside the storefronts, and a hanging sign that reads CAFÉ LUNA. A few distant pedestrians appear softly blurred in the far background. Shot at eye level with shallow depth of field, natural golden morning light, soft bokeh, realistic skin and fabric textures, warm neutral color grading, intimate travel editorial photography, vertical composition.
